text: 1. Limited Denial of Participation. HUDmay issue to the employer a limited denial of  participation  (LDP)  which  prohibits  the  employer  from  further  participation  in HUD programs for a period up to one year.  The LDP is usually effective for the HUD program in which the violation occurred and for the geographic jurisdiction of the issuing HUD Office.  HUD regulations concerning LDP's are found at 24 CFR 24.700-24.714.
